bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: RAG tension read from dead flux field instead of run.hidden.tension. Also fixed karma path.
Dead Souffle cost (opt[cost]=1) on center option removed. All options now free per bible v2.4.
Unsafe dot notation dict access in configure_from_registry() and _update_stats(). Changed to bracket/.get().
Dead ClassDB.class_exists guard + unreachable ResourceLoader fallback for MerlinOmniscient init. Removed 16 lines.

overall_assessment: Zero known bugs remaining. All 12 bugs found across 4 cycles are resolved: 2 CRITICAL, 6 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM. Core loop invariants verified (life 0-100, rep caps, MOS bounds, 3 options, promise cap). AI layer fully cleaned of dead system references (Flux, Souffle, ClassDB fallback). Ready for feature development.
